title: Cysylltu â’r tribiwnlys
genericGuidanceRep: [W]Upload letters, photos or documents if they are relevant to the claimant’s application. Do not upload any other material.
contactApplicationTextRep: [W]Give details of the claimant’s application in the text box or upload a file

content.text: Dweud neu ofyn i’r tribiwnlys am rywbeth sy’n berthnasol i’ch achos.
Peidiwch â defnyddio'r ffurflen hon i:

items: geisio cyngor cyfreithiol gan y tribiwnlys. Mae’r tribiwnlys yn gorff barnwrol annibynnol ac ni all roi cyngor cyfreithiol i chi
dweud wrthym am gynigion neu drafodaethau setlo, sy’n breifat ac yn gyfrinachol i’r partïon

contentRep.text: [W]Tell or ask the tribunal about something relevant to the claimant’s case.

items: [W]seek legal advice from the tribunal. The tribunal is an independent judicial body and cannot give legal advice
[W]tell us about settlement offers or discussions, which are private and confidential to the parties
